mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, parent_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS author FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS author FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS author FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
